subject: A green reptilian humanoid figure hovers mid-air with arms outstretched, surrounded by swirling fire and energy effects
suspected_ip: Hoi (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A slender green humanoid figure with pronounced reptilian or insectoid features is depicted mid-air in a wide stance with arms outstretched. The figure wears a layered garment in muted earth tones. Intense orange and red fire bursts radiate outward from around the figure's body, while streaks of golden-yellow energy and green highlights fill the surrounding space. The composition is a mid-shot showing the figure roughly centered, the fire effects creating a dramatic halo. The background is consumed by the energy and flame display. The overall mood is aggressive and explosive.
foreground: green humanoid figure hovering with arms spread, surrounded by fire
background: explosive fire and energy burst, consuming the frame
emotion: aggressive, commanding — arms spread wide in an unleashing gesture
